Shopkeeper.opening: Afternoon. What can I get you?

responses.text: Seen the news today? Mental isn't it.
responses.outcome_payload: You should talk to Dave at the Crown. He knows things.

responses.text: How's business since the new regulations?
responses.outcome_payload: Please don't ask me that in here.

Pensioner.opening: Not like it used to be round here.

responses.outcome_payload: The cameras. There used to be two on this street. Count them now.

responses.text: You can't say that any more, can you?
responses.outcome_payload: Conversation flagged.

Student.opening: Do you know where the Community Values Centre is?

responses.text: Down the road on the left.
What do you need that for?
responses.outcome_payload: Mandatory workshop. Third one this month.

responses.text: Don't bother. It's a waste of time.
responses.outcome_payload: Advisory: discouraging civic participation is a Category 2 concern.

Office Worker.opening: If this is about parking fines, I don't work for that team.

responses.outcome_payload: Basement office. Door marked Records.

responses.text: You know this whole thing is rigged, right?
responses.outcome_payload: Nearby phone cameras pivot toward you.

Bus Driver.opening: Tap in, tap out, keep your head down.

responses.outcome_payload: Every shift. They call it wellbeing.

responses.text: Do you disable cameras on night routes?
responses.outcome_payload: Driver shuts the door in your face.

Courier.opening: Package for flat 12B. Signature and civility PIN.

responses.outcome_payload: Council contractor. Warehouse south side.

responses.text: Lose the parcel and tell them it was stolen.
responses.outcome_payload: Courier backs away and reports an incident.

Council Clerk.opening: Applications, permits, confessions. Queue forms to the left.

responses.outcome_payload: Try me with two grand and no receipts.
Clerk notes your face and ends conversation.

Nurse.opening: We triage by urgency and by policy now.

responses.outcome_payload: Weekly updates. Nobody can keep up.
Nurse whispers: I didn't hear that.

Barfly.opening: You here for football or trouble?

responses.outcome_payload: Back fence has a blind spot.

responses.text: Know how to jam police comms?
responses.outcome_payload: Bar goes quiet. Someone leaves to make a call.

Journalist.opening: Off the record doesn't exist any more.

responses.outcome_payload: m7_archive
Phone buzz: pre-emptive moderation warning issued.
